name: Grilled New Potatoes with Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes on stove top in water to cover or in microwave oven on HIGH until almost tender.
2. Drain potatoes.
3. Toss with garlic, rosemary, and olive oil.
4. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
5. Divide potatoes into halves.
6. Place each batch in a single layer between large pieces of heavy-duty foil (or double thickness regular foil).
7. Bring up the ends of foil to close airtight.
8. Puncture several holes in each package.
9. Place on grill rack over hot coals, turning several times until cooked, about 7 minutes total.
10. Unwrap and serve immediately.
Makes 6 servings.
